title: cleome aurea
intro: Cleome aurea, also known as Yellow Spiderflower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its bright yellow and delicate flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cleome aurea include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, while also exhibiting antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. In herbal preparations, Cleome aurea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential interactions with other medications.
